_comment: Deploy template — DO NOT hardcode credentials. Use GitHub Actions OIDC or SSM SecureString.
_usage: Pass this to: aws ssm send-command --cli-input-json file://final-deploy.json
_credentials: AWS credentials are injected by EC2 instance IAM role — do NOT embed AKI/SAK/TOK.

commands: aws ecr get-login-password --region ap-southeast-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin $ECR
# Load env from SSM Parameter Store — no plaintext secrets in this file
ADMIN_USER=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /nanoclaw/admin-user --with-decryption --query Parameter.Value --output text --region ap-southeast-1 2>/dev/null || echo admin)
ADMIN_PASS=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /nanoclaw/admin-pass --with-decryption --query Parameter.Value --output text --region ap-southeast-1)

docker run -d --name nanoclaw-orchestrator --restart unless-stopped --network host --user root -e NANOCLAW_ENV=cloud -e AWS_REGION=ap-southeast-1 -e ADMIN_USER=$ADMIN_USER -e ADMIN_PASS=$ADMIN_PASS -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock -v $DOCKER_BIN:/usr/local/bin/docker:ro -v /opt/nanoclaw-data:/app/data nanoclaw-orchestrator:current
docker ps | grep nanoclaw-orchestrator && echo RUNNING || echo NOT_RUNNING
